name: property managers handling 5–15 properties/month tool
description: For property managers processing 5–15 properties/month, inefficient report compilation causes compliance delays. We automate report generation instead of manual report compilation using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inefficient compilation of compliance audit reports
features: manual data entry for compliance metrics
